programs.title: Nhk Newsline
programs.desc: . NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programs.title: Cinematic Journey
programs.desc: . A scientific trek into Earth's memory. See Anami's ancient strata, the singing sands of Kotobikihama, and the geological time gaps of Uradome's rocks.

programs.title: Core Kyoto
programs.desc: years ago used cloth dyed with the colors of prayer, many of which are lost to time. Some today are fascinated with these forgotten colors and are attempting to revive them. Gary Tegler, Takuji Takahashi, Ikuko Takeda, Sumie Nagakusa, Tomoko Eri, Toshiaki Nagakusa, Kokei Eri, Yoshiaki Dobuchi.

programs.desc: . NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programs.title: Century Signboards
programs.desc: . Nori tsukudani, a popular topping in rice-loving Japan. Made with local nori from Tokyo Bay, it's a taste and tradition preserved for over 100 years.

programs.title: Satoyama Kitchen Spring
programs.desc: Hi, it's me, Tama! Today, my humans, Grandpa Makoto and Grandma Nobuko, left wearing strange outfits. That's because they're going to pick himetake bamboo shoots with two experts. I hope they get enough for me, too.
